overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a rainy desert highway at dusk. The stationary camera positioned on the roadside captures vehicles driving past on wet asphalt, with an illuminated billboard and wind turbines visible through the misty downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder during heavy rainstorm

events.description: yellow off-road vehicle passes close by from left to right with headlights on
black sedan overtakes and passes close to camera position
white sedan enters frame from left and passes by with brake lights illuminated

agents.ego_description: stationary on the highway shoulder, observing traffic passing by in heavy rain

notable_agents.action: yellow SUV with roof rack driving past camera position from left to right
oncoming traffic with headlights visible approaching in the distance

entered.detail: tall white lattice tower with multiple platforms standing beside the highway
large red and white billboard with 'CONDENAST' text glowing in the misty distance
multiple wind turbines silhouetted against the gray sky on the horizon
scrub vegetation and tumbleweeds along the roadside
tall saguaro cacti standing among the desert scrub
utility poles with power lines running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: A stationary cinematic shot captures a rain-soaked desert highway during a dark, stormy dusk. Vehicles including sedans and SUVs periodically pass by on the multi-lane asphalt, their headlights cutting through the heavy downpour. An illuminated billboard stands prominently in the misty distance, flanked by wind turbines on the horizon, while a tall radio tower looms on the left and desert vegetation lines the right shoulder.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary cinematic perspective of a rain-soaked desert highway as the stormy dusk deepens. It begins with a wide view of the multi-lane asphalt where sedans and SUVs periodically pass, their headlights cutting through a heavy, persistent downpour. As the rain continues to fall, the focus extends toward the misty horizon where an illuminated billboard and distant wind turbines glow against the dark sky. The scene remains anchored by a looming radio tower on the left and sparse desert vegetation on the right, capturing the atmospheric tension of the storm.
